name: model-picker-tanstack-openrouter
title: Model Picker TanStack OpenRouter
author: d3serve Labs
description: Optional type-safe TanStack AI OpenRouter adapter helpers for Model Picker models.
docs: Install this only if your app uses TanStack AI with OpenRouter. createModelPickerOpenRouterModel keeps OpenRouter model IDs typed against the installed adapter, and createModelPickerOpenRouterTextAdapter avoids casts at the call site.
